description: V2P-WSSP follow-up after advisor discussion: pressure and wall WSS are primary metrics; velocity is only weak auxiliary supervision / diagnostic context.
notes: Use with wall-rich + near-wall processed graphs. Main metrics: r2_p/rmse_p and wall.r2_wss/wall.rmse_wss. Do not use r2_vel_mag as the success gate for this manifest.

items.purpose: Pressure + wall WSS primary objective with weak u/v/w auxiliary supervision.
